ValidationRule.description: Prevents any monthly total or Prev Dec Total field from being set to a negative value.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(NOT(ISNULL(Jan_Total__c)), Jan_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Feb_Total__c)), Feb_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Mar_Total__c)), Mar_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Apr_Total__c)), Apr_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(May_Total__c)), May_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Jun_Total__c)), Jun_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Jul_Total__c)), Jul_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Aug_Total__c)), Aug_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Sep_Total__c)), Sep_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Oct_Total__c)), Oct_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Nov_Total__c)), Nov_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Dec_Total__c)), Dec_Total__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISNULL(Prev_Dec_Total__c)), Prev_Dec_Total__c < 0) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Total fields cannot be negative. Please enter a value of 0 or greater for all monthly totals.
